message:
chore: update uv.lock for v0.2.0 release

Update lockfile to reflect the version bump from 0.1.5 to 0.2.0.
This ensures reproducible builds with the new version.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1050,7 +1050,7 @@ wheels = [
 
 [[package]]
 name = "mcp-agent-mail"
-version = "0.1.5"
+version = "0.2.0"
 source = { editable = "." }
 dependencies = [
     { name = "aiolimiter" },
